title: bridelia fordii
intro: Bridelia fordii, also known as the Chinese Bridelia or Qianli wan, is a type of plant that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family, commonly found in the tropical regions of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. Bridelia fordii has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders, and has been found to have antioxidant and anti-cancer properties, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
